_FORMAT_GUIDE.title: Project name
_FORMAT_GUIDE.creator: Full name of the student who made it
_FORMAT_GUIDE.team: Team name (optional — leave empty string if no team)
_FORMAT_GUIDE.isWide: Set to true for horizontal projects (optional)

tutorials.title: The Legacy Collection
tutorials.description: A massive fleet of high-performance aerial systems, including custom-built RC planes and FPV racing drones. This comprehensive collection represents years of aeronautical engineering and precision flight testing.
tutorials.creator: Aryaman Yadav & Akshar Yadav

tutorials.title: Combat Bot: 'Yadav' Heavyweight
tutorials.description: A professional-grade combat robot built for maximum destruction and durability. Features a custom-engraved steel chassis and high-torque drivetrain designed for heavy combat scenarios.
tutorials.creator: Aryaman Yadav

tutorials.title: Twin Combat Interceptors
tutorials.description: A pair of agile combat robots used for tactical scrimmages. These units are primary testbeds for new radio protocols and flight controller stabilization.
tutorials.creator: Akshar Yadav

tutorials.title: Robo Nexus Fleet v2025
tutorials.description: The complete operational fleet of Robo Nexus for the 2025 season. Showcasing the full spectrum of our engineering from lightweight soccer bots to industrial-grade combat machines.
tutorials.creator: Aryaman & Akshar Yadav

tutorials.title: Robo Soccer Car
tutorials.description: The first version of a Robo Soccer Car developed by the 2f4u team. It features an ESP32 controller, an L298N motor driver, and high-torque DC BO motors.
tutorials.creator: 2fast4u

tutorials.title: Robo Soccer Car (Unit 2)
tutorials.description: The second unit of the first-version Robo Soccer Car developed by the 2f4u team, identical in specs and performance to Unit 1.
tutorials.creator: 2fast4u

tutorials.title: Robo Soccer Car V2 (Attacker)
tutorials.description: The 2025 version of the 2f4u soccer car, optimized for offense with high-speed 500 RPM Johnson motors, dual BTS7960 drivers, and a durable metal chassis.
tutorials.creator: 2fast4u

tutorials.title: Robo Soccer Car V2 (Defender)
tutorials.description: The 2025 version of the 2f4u soccer car, optimized for defense with high-torque 300 RPM Johnson motors, dual BTS7960 drivers, and a durable metal chassis.
tutorials.creator: 2fast4u
